title: Integrate revert decoder and structured error codes into @bolyra/sdk

artifacts.description: BolyraError base class, ErrorCode enum (STALE_ROOT, SCOPE_MISMATCH, CREDENTIAL_EXPIRED, NULLIFIER_SEEN, PROOF_INVALID, WITNESS_GEN_FAILED, DELEGATION_OVERFLOW, NONCE_REPLAY, UNKNOWN_REVERT), and recovery hint interpolation logic

ethers-based revert decoder: parses custom error selectors from IdentityRegistry and DelegationVerifier ABI, maps 4-byte selectors to ErrorCode instances, decodes error arguments for hint interpolation
Wrap proveHandshake and verifyHandshake with try/catch that funnels raw ethers ContractError and snarkjs failures through the revert decoder and BolyraError factory
Re-export BolyraError, ErrorCode, and decodeRevert from the public surface
Audit custom error declarations (StaleRoot, ScopeMismatch, CredentialExpired, NullifierSeen) to confirm ABI encoding matches decoder expectations — no changes expected, read-only audit
Unit tests for ErrorCode enum coverage, hint interpolation with known argument sets, and fallback to UNKNOWN_REVERT for unrecognized selectors
Integration tests: simulate each IdentityRegistry custom error via ethers provider mock, assert decoded BolyraError has correct .code and non-empty .hint
End-to-end handshake tests that inject invalid proofs and stale roots, assert BolyraError is thrown with expected .code instead of raw revert data
Developer guide: ErrorCode reference table, programmatic branching patterns, recovery hint examples for each error class, migration note for callers currently catching generic Error
Normative error code registry for the Bolyra protocol: stable integer identifiers, semantic definitions, required fields (.code, .hint, .cause), and versioning policy

steps: Read contracts/src/IdentityRegistry.sol and DelegationVerifier.sol to extract all custom error signatures and their ABI-encoded argument types
Define ErrorCode enum in sdk/src/errors.ts covering all on-chain custom errors plus off-chain failure modes (witness gen, proof invalid, nonce replay, delegation overflow)
Implement BolyraError class extending Error with fields: code: ErrorCode, hint: string, cause?: unknown; add static factory fromCode(code, args) with per-code hint templates
Build revert-decoder.ts: compute 4-byte selectors for each custom error using ethers.id, create selector→ErrorCode map, parse ContractError.data to extract and decode arguments, return BolyraError
Add snarkjs error normalization in revert-decoder.ts: detect known snarkjs exception messages (e.g. 'Constraint doesn't match') and map to ErrorCode.PROOF_INVALID or WITNESS_GEN_FAILED
Wrap verifyHandshake in sdk/src/handshake.ts: catch ethers ContractError, pipe through decodeRevert, rethrow as BolyraError; catch snarkjs errors and normalize similarly
Wrap proveHandshake in sdk/src/handshake.ts: catch witness generation and proving errors, map to BolyraError with WITNESS_GEN_FAILED or PROOF_INVALID codes
Update sdk/src/index.ts to export BolyraError, ErrorCode, and decodeRevert
Write unit tests in sdk/test/errors.test.ts covering all ErrorCode values and hint interpolation edge cases
Write revert decoder tests in sdk/test/revert-decoder.test.ts using ethers provider mocks that return crafted revert data for each custom error
Write handshake integration tests in sdk/test/handshake-errors.test.ts with Hardhat local node, trigger each contract revert path, assert BolyraError.code matches
Run npm run typecheck and npm test in sdk/ — fix any type errors, ensure all new tests pass
Write sdk/docs/error-handling.md with ErrorCode reference table, branching examples, and migration guide
Write spec/error-codes.md as normative registry with stable identifiers and versioning policy
Update sdk/CHANGELOG.md and bump minor version to reflect public API addition
dependencies: ethers v6 (already in sdk/package.json for on-chain calls)
Hardhat local node for integration tests (dev dependency, already present)
